title: mentha × clandestina
intro: Mentha × clandestina, also known as lemon mint, is a hybrid species of mint that combines the characteristics of Mentha aquatica and Mentha citrata. The medicinal properties of Mentha × clandestina include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of consuming Mentha × clandestina include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide relief from symptoms of colds and flu. Mentha × clandestina can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
